page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package provides a function to infer pathway activity from gene expression using PROGENy. It contains the linear model we inferred in the publication "Perturbation-response genes reveal signaling footprints in cancer gene expression".
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package provides a function to infer pathway activity from gene expression using PROGENy. It contains the linear model we inferred in the publication "Perturbation-response genes reveal signaling footprints in cancer gene expression".
